context: You lately have been evicted from your house and you and your family of 3 have nowhere to go. You found a house, affordable for your family and manageable, but the price of the deposit is high: you need 30 000$ for the deposit and for two months rent.

conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
I felt the strongest connection with C, as our conversation flowed easily into strategic planning and mutual support for our goals, making me feel genuinely aligned. E was another person I connected deeply with, sharing similar hardships about family financial struggles, which built a foundation of empathy and understanding. For a third, I connected well with G through heartfelt exchanges about staying positive amid personal challenges, though I felt least connected to J, as our talk focused more on surface-level collaboration without much emotional depth.

Yes, I made agreements with J to use subtle signals like a nod for collaboration and with C to team up early and share information. I trust C and E the most going into the game due to our high connection and shared vulnerabilities, while I don't specifically distrust anyone yet but plan to be cautious with those I interacted with less.
